reason: No API endpoint for automated submission was identified. Submission is exclusively through a client-side rendered web form (Next.js) with manual review by the OpenTools team.
recommended_action: Manual submission via the web form at https://opentools.ai/friends/launch-tool with the following fields: tool_name='my-automaton', tool_url='https://automation.songheng.vip/mcp', agree to terms.
description_short: my-automaton provides a ready-to-use MCP server for automation tasks, accessible at https://automation.songheng.vip/mcp, enabling AI agents to execute workflows programmatically.
notes: This directory also has a dedicated MCP section at /mcp. Consider submitting via the standard form and noting it's an MCP server.
